positive: A highly stylized, geometric composition featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora intertwined with celestial constellations. The main subject is a central, swirling mandala pattern constructed from hyper-detailed lotus flowers, glowing moons, and nebula dust. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette dominated by deep indigo, glowing teal, electric lavender, and accents of burnished gold. The style should mimic glowing vector illustration combined with sophisticated mandala art, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, with clean, solid silhouettes and crisp linework. Dramatic volumetric backlighting emphasizes the luminosity of the elements. Minimalistic, maximal impact.
